args.code: (()=>{try{const keys=Object.keys(window).filter(function(k){const v=window[k];if(v&&typeof v==='object'){if(v.day!==undefined&&v.money!==undefined&&v.season!==undefined)return true;if(v.gameState)return true;if(v.state&&v.state.day!==undefined)return true;}return false;});const ls=localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1');let saveData=null;if(ls){try{saveData=JSON.parse(ls);}catch(e){saveData={parseError:e.message};}}function safeMap(obj,fn){if(!obj)return 'none';if(Array.isArray(obj))return obj.map(fn).join(',');if(typeof obj==='object')return Object.keys(obj).map(function(k){return fn(obj[k],k);}).join(',');return 'none';}function safeArray(arr,fn){if(!arr||!Array.isArray(arr))return[];return arr.slice(-3).map(fn);}return{candidates:keys.slice(0,20),saveDataExists:!!ls,saveDataPreview:saveData?{day:saveData.day,season:saveData.season,weather:saveData.weather,money:saveData.money,energy:saveData.energy,maxEnergy:saveData.maxEnergy,health:saveData.health,maxHealth:saveData.maxHealth,fields:saveData.fields?saveData.fields.length:0,events:saveData.eventHistory?saveData.eventHistory.length:0,skills:saveData.skills?Object.keys(saveData.skills).map(function(k){return k+':'+saveData.skills[k].level;}).join(','):'none',npcs:saveData.npcs?Object.keys(saveData.npcs).map(function(k){return k+':'+saveData.npcs[k].affection;}).join('/'):'none',reputation:saveData.reputation,mood:saveData.mood,house:saveData.house&&saveData.house.level!==undefined?saveData.house.level:'none',mode:saveData.difficulty||saveData.mode,version:saveData.saveVersion,saveSize:ls.length,warehouse:saveData.warehouse?{rice:saveData.warehouse.rice||0,sweetPotato:saveData.warehouse.sweetPotato||0,limit:saveData.warehouse.limit||0}:null,processed:saveData.processedItems?Object.keys(saveData.processedItems).map(function(k){return k+':'+saveData.processedItems[k];}).join(','):'none',research:saveData.researchPoints||0,totalHarvest:saveData.statistics?saveData.statistics.totalHarvest:0,totalSales:saveData.statistics?saveData.statistics.totalSales:0,pets:safeMap(saveData.pets,function(p){return p&&p.name?p.name:'unknown';}),milestones:saveData.milestones&&Array.isArray(saveData.milestones)?saveData.milestones.filter(function(m){return m.unlocked;}).length+'/'+saveData.milestones.length:'none',quests:saveData.quests&&Array.isArray(saveData.quests)?saveData.quests.filter(function(q){return q.completed;}).length+'/'+saveData.quests.length:'none',daysPlayed:saveData.daysPlayed||saveData.day,disasterRate:saveData.disasterRate||'-',speed:saveData.speed||1,eventHistoryLast:safeArray(saveData.eventHistory,function(e){return e.text;})}:null};}catch(e){return{error:e.message,stack:e.stack};}})()
